en: Masters, treat your slaves justly and fairly, knowing that you also have a Master in heaven.
zh: 你們作主人的，要公平地對待僕人，因為知道你們也有一位主在天上。

en: Continue steadfastly in prayer, being watchful in it with thanksgiving.
zh: 你們要恆切禱告，在禱告的時候存著感恩的心警醒；

en: At the same time, pray also for us, that God may open to us a door for the word, to declare the mystery of Christ, on account of which I am in prison-
zh: 也要為我們禱告，求 神為我們開傳道的門，宣講基督的奧祕 ，

en: that I may make it clear, which is how I ought to speak.
zh: 使我照著我所應當說的，把這奧祕顯明出來。

en: Conduct yourselves wisely toward outsiders, making the best use of the time.
zh: 你們要把握時機，用智慧與外人來往。

en: Let your speech always be gracious, seasoned with salt, so that you may know how you ought to answer each person.
zh: 你們的話要常常溫和，好像是用鹽調和的，使你們知道應當怎樣回答各人。

en: Tychicus will tell you all about my activities. He is a beloved brother and faithful minister and fellow servant in the Lord.
zh: 我的一切景況，推基古會告訴你們。他是我所愛的弟兄，是忠心的僕役，也是在主裡同作僕人的。

en: I have sent him to you for this very purpose, that you may know how we are and that he may encourage your hearts,
zh: 我派他到你們那裡去，使你們知道我們的景況，並且安慰你們的心。

en: and with him Onesimus, our faithful and beloved brother, who is one of you. They will tell you of everything that has taken place here.
zh: 他是跟歐尼西慕一同去的。歐尼西慕是忠心的親愛的弟兄，是你們那裡的人。他們會把這裡的一切告訴你們。

en: Aristarchus my fellow prisoner greets you, and Mark the cousin of Barnabas (concerning whom you have received instructions- if he comes to you, welcome him),
zh: 與我一同坐監的亞里達古，和巴拿巴的表弟馬可，問候你們。

en: and Jesus who is called Justus. These are the only men of the circumcision among my fellow workers for the kingdom of God, and they have been a comfort to me.
zh: 別號猶士都的耶數，也問候你們。在受過割禮的人中，只有這幾位是為 神的國與我同工的，他們也成了我的安慰。

en: Epaphras, who is one of you, a servant of Christ Jesus, greets you, always struggling on your behalf in his prayers, that you may stand mature and fully assured in all the will of God.
zh: 以巴弗問候你們，他是你們那裡的人，是基督耶穌的僕人；他禱告的時候，常常竭力為你們祈求，好使你們在 神的一切旨意中完全站穩，滿有堅定的信念。

en: For I bear him witness that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and in Hierapolis.
zh: 我可以為他作證，他為了你們和在老底嘉、希拉波立的人，多受勞苦。

en: Luke the beloved physician greets you, as does Demas.
zh: 親愛的路加醫生和底馬問候你們。

en: Give my greetings to the brothers at Laodicea, and to Nympha and the church in her house.
zh: 請問候在老底嘉的弟兄和寧法，以及在她家裡的教會。

en: And when this letter has been read among you, have it also read in the church of the Laodiceans; and see that you also read the letter from Laodicea.
zh: 這封信你們宣讀了以後，也要交給老底嘉的教會宣讀；你們也要讀老底嘉的那封信。

en: And say to Archippus, "See that you fulfill the ministry that you have received in the Lord."
zh: 你們要對亞基布說：“你要留心在主裡領受的職分，好把它完成。”

en: I, Paul, write this greeting with my own hand. Remember my chains. Grace be with you.
zh: 我保羅親筆問候你們。你們要記念我的捆鎖。願恩惠與你們同在。
